name: open-code-review
description: Codex-owned code reviews using OCR deterministic context tooling.

interface.shortDescription: Codex-owned reviews with OCR context tooling.
interface.longDescription: Codex performs review reasoning while OCR provides deterministic diff, scan, rule, context, validation, report, and session services.
defaultPrompt: Use Open Code Review to review my current changes.
